detail.confirmResume: Resume a new pod from sandbox of "{podKey}"? This will create a new pod using the existing workspace.
detail.resumeFailed: Failed to resume pod. Please try again.
detail.noPods: No pods found for this runner
detail.resumeTooltip: Create a new pod using the existing sandbox workspace
detail.resumeDialogDescription: You are about to resume from the sandbox of "{podKey}".
detail.resumeDialogInfo: This will create a new Pod using the existing workspace, allowing the AI agent to continue from where it left off.
detail.upgradeConfirm: Möchten Sie diesen Runner wirklich auf die neueste Version aktualisieren? Der Runner wird nach dem Upgrade neu gestartet.
detail.upgradeSent: Upgrade-Befehl gesendet. Der Runner wird automatisch herunterladen und neu starten.
detail.upgradeFailed: Upgrade-Befehl konnte nicht gesendet werden. Bitte versuchen Sie es erneut.
detail.upgradeOffline: Runner ist offline, Upgrade nicht möglich
detail.upgradeHasPods: Runner hat aktive Pods, Upgrade nicht möglich
detail.upgradeTooltip: Runner auf die neueste Version aktualisieren

authorize.title: Authorize Runner
authorize.description: A Runner is requesting to connect to your organization. Authorize it to enable AI agent task execution.
authorize.missingAuthKey: Authorization key is missing. Please use the full URL from the runner login command.
authorize.invalidAuthKey: This authorization link is invalid or has expired.
authorize.expiredDescription: This authorization link has expired. Authorization links are valid for 15 minutes.
authorize.rerunCommand: Please run the login command again to get a new authorization link.
authorize.successDescription: The Runner has been successfully authorized and will receive its certificate shortly.
authorize.closeWindow: You can close this window and return to your terminal.
authorize.signInRequired: Sign in to authorize this Runner
authorize.noOrganizations: You don't have any organizations. Please create one first.
authorize.nodeIdHint: A unique identifier for this runner. Leave empty to auto-generate.
authorize.authorizeFailed: Failed to authorize runner. Please try again.
authorize.quotaExceeded: Runner quota exceeded. Please upgrade your plan or remove unused runners.
